content: Nothing is coming to mind so just run huz and never die I guess

I wouldn't start with Winkle as a new player, personally. She's a great support/battery character but this will leave you with Lotan/Ramona as your only source of damage early on. Jenkin is a great damage dealer throughout. Ultra realm will be a little harder to manage defensively unless you roll the current banner (Castor).

Caecus would be a very reliable defensive option. Goliath will shift from a damage-dealing to a buff support role as you progress. Both are in Aequor which is a little simpler to start with since you can freely swap to defensive/offensive stances each turn.

I think Nautila and Karen (questionable) are also okay picks. Nautila's counter and defense can get you through a lot of early stages. Karen gives a little sustain, arithmetica (energy), and some on-demand defensive tools. Both are Chaos which is the same realm as the story characters and can be splashed into other realms while retaining full bonuses and gaining some unique ones.
You get to choose which Realm you're rolling in for standard characters so I would pick a character from a realm that you're not going to roll
